Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOY NEWHART Amended (Re-Notice) of Motion and Motion to Dismiss Action Pursuant To CCP 583.210 & 583.250(a) (2). Appearances: Michael K. Sipes, Esq. Attorney at Law, (916) 230-0477 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiff and opposing party; Defendant Joy Newhart, appearing in Pro Per and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied without prejudice. Computation of time tolled by entry of default judgment. Insufficient showing that interests of justice would best be served by dismissal of case. (Plaintiff's Counsel to prepare Order.)
